Describe what is happening in the surfing scenes?
canonical_answer: Surfers wearing dark wetsuits ride white surfboards on ocean waves. One individual performs an aerial maneuver above the wave lip before landing back on the face. Another surfer loses balance and falls, causing the board to launch into the air. The water appears murky green-grey with significant white foam spray generated by breaking crests.

question: Describe the sequence of visible events involving the surfer and text overlay.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a person wearing a black wetsuit with short blonde hair appears paddling; at 5s, white text overlay is present in the center; at 6s, the text appears distorted or glitching on screen; at 7s, the scene becomes empty leaving only water visible.

question: Outline the changes occurring in the scene from the surfer's appearance to the empty frame.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a surfer is paddling away from the camera on a white surfboard; at 5s, text reads 'Its just one of those days at Hunington Beach'; at 6s, the text overlay begins glitching visually; at 7s, the person paddling on surfboard disappears from view.
